programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a writer is murdered at a literary event, Rudyard Kipling and Lucy Maud Montgomery come under Murdoch's scrutiny.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates a man's murder outside a burlesque show performed by Crabtree's former paramour Nina Bloom.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a motorcycle enthusiast dies, Murdoch's investigation is aided by mechanics William Harley and Arthur Davidson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: While investigating a murder in a tight-lipped Mennonite colony, Murdoch and Ogden don plain clothing and go undercover.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Hours before a clandestine visit by President Taft, Murdoch is entangled by Terence Meyers in an experiment gone wrong.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the brutal on-camera murder of an actress during the filming of a movie about the clown killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Honeymooning in England, Crabtree and Effie find a dead hotel guest while Murdoch investigates an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: As Murdoch investigates the murder of an elite athlete who gets impaled by a javelin, Hart and Arthur plot her father's demise.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: A police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop.

programme.title: Marauders
programme.desc: A group of robbers is chased by an FBI agent who uncovers a deeper conspiracy behind the robbery-homicides.

programme.title: Secret in Their Eyes
programme.desc: A team of investigators is torn apart when one of their teenage daughters is brutally murdered.

programme.title: Texas Killing Fields
programme.desc: In the Texas bayous, a local detective works with a New York cop to investigate a series of unsolved murders.

programme.title: The Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: An ex-boxer turned enforcer has his loyalties tested when his employers order him to kill for the first time.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Gerry [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Friends Gerry (Casey Affleck) and Gerry (Matt Damon) hike into Death Valley, but they stray so far from the trail that they have no idea how to get back. Initially, they maintain morale by rehashing old stories and reciting inside jokes, but the gravity of their situation sinks in as a return to civilization becomes more unlikely. As the sheer scope, hypnotic pull and spirit-crushing mirages of the desert affect the men, their will to live and sense of identity is challenged and transformed.

programme.title: Funny Games
programme.desc: Two violent young men take a mother, father, and son hostage in their vacation cabin and force them to play sadistic "games" with one another for their own amusement.

programme.title: Glengarry Glen Ross
programme.desc: An examination of the machinations behind the scenes at a real estate office.

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: A Holocaust survivor's tragic past.

programme.title: The Beastmaster
programme.desc: A sword-and-sorcery fantasy about a young man's search for revenge. Armed with supernatural powers, the handsome hero and his animal allies wage war against marauding forces

programme.title: Maximum Risk
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as retired Sergeant Major from the French army who is pulled into a murder mystery involving the death of his twin brother he never knew. Determined to learn more about his American brother, he assumes a Russian identity and travels to New York.

programme.title: Straw Dogs
programme.desc: In a rural town, a young couple (James Marsden and Kate Bosworth) fights for survival when they re marked for death by depraved locals led by a ruthless predator (Alexander Skarsgård).

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Two brothers return home at the end of the war to find their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown To D-Day
programme.desc: A study of the days leading up to the Normandy invasion through the eyes of Eisenhower and Winston Churchill.

programme.title: The Beast
programme.desc: Spectacular action sequences punctuate an emotionally charged war story that pits Soviet soldiers against Afghan rebels.

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: It is 1942 and Norway is under the thumb of the Nazis. In a Norwegian factory, Nazis are producing "heavy water," an essential element in the production of atomic weapons. The leader of the Norwegian underground is enlisted by British intelligence to aid in destroying the factory.

programme.title: Don't Knock The Twist
programme.desc: Following the preparations for a TV special on the twist, this rock 'n' roll musical features performances by Chubby Checker, Gene Chandler, Vic Dana, The Carroll Brothers and the Dovells. Musical numbers include "Duke of Earl," "Do the New Continental" and "Mash Potato Time".

programme.title: The Lone Wolf And His Lady
programme.desc: Ron Randell plays a former jewel thief turned reporter, who gets into trouble when he is assigned to cover the exhibition of a famous diamond. When the jewel disappears, Randell is accused of stealing it. It is all Randell can do to keep out of the police's reach, so he can track down the real culprits.

programme.title: The Magic Carpet
programme.desc: Arabian Nights-type of tale stars Agar as a deposed prince trying to free his people from the evil rule of the caliph, the princess Narah (Lucille Ball) and his vizier, played by Burr. Agar enlists the aid of harem girl Patricia Medina and together they win back the province, while zipping around on a flying carpet.

programme.title: Fire Down Below
programme.desc: A pair of small-time smugglers have a falling out over the love of a sexy, and disreputable, woman.

programme.title: Nightbreed: Director's Cut
programme.desc: Boone (Craig Sheffer) may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates “us” from “them” and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: In a Norwegian city with a 24-hour daylight cycle a Swedish murder investigator has been brought in on a special case. Sleep deprived, he makes a horrible mistake which is discovered by the killer he has been hunting.

programme.title: The Ticket
programme.desc: A blind man who regains his vision finds himself becoming metaphorically blinded by his obsession for the superficial.

programme.title: The Stepfather
programme.desc: After murdering his entire family, a man remarries a widow with a teenage daughter in another town and prepares to do it all over again.

programme.title: Nosferatu The Vampyre [Subbed]
programme.desc: Count Dracula moves from Transylvania to Wismar, spreading the Black Plague across the land. Only a woman pure of heart can bring an end to his reign of horror.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: Dave Lizewski makes the simple decision to become a super-hero even though he has no powers or training.

programme.title: NYC Underground
programme.desc: When a drug deal turns bad, a wealthy man and his friends are forced into the subway to evade gang-members.

programme.title: The Prince
programme.desc: When his daughter is kidnapped, a retired assassin is drawn back into the life he gave up.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: A father goes undercover and infiltrates a Mexican drug cartel for the DEA in order to free his son.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Kung Fu Killer
programme.desc: Released from prison, a kung-fu expert tries to help the police find a vicious serial killer who targets martial-arts masters.

programme.title: The Swordsman
programme.desc: A swordsman who is going blind is forced to raise his sword again to save his daughter, who has been kidnapped by a slave dealer.

programme.title: Baby Assassins
programme.desc: Two high school girls who are about to graduate also happen to be highly-skilled assassins. When the organization that employs them orders them to share a room, their relationship turns sour.

programme.title: Baby Assassins 2
programme.desc: Chisato and Mahiro must pay four years of overdue fees or lose their membership in their assassin guild. They take part-time jobs, but find themselves in the middle of an armed robbery and being hunted by other assassins.

programme.title: Preman: The Silent Fury
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a brutal murder by a notorious crime boss, a deaf Indonesian gangster is thrust into the fight of his life when he takes on his dangerous former allies to protect his child.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to replace his wife.

programme.title: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal with Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: My Husband's Killer Affair
programme.desc: Michelle hires a nanny, but has no idea the danger that she has put her family in.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to replace his wife.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is hosting a 90210 themed party and wants to create some classic Beverly Hills appys.

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: A writer returns to her hometown for inspiration and reinkindles her romance with her first love.

programme.title: Heart of the Manor
programme.desc: Real-estate agent Lisa competes with developer Matthew who wants to buy her family's manor.

programme.title: Falling For the Competition
programme.desc: A local mom’s and dad’s group clash for the prestigious Modern Parenting Group of the Year award.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Duke Diver is living the high life as the freewheeling manager of a luxurious resort in Palm Springs, Calif. He soon faces competition from Leo, a former military man who likes the same woman that Duke is interested in. When Diver's past suddenly catches up with him, he must put aside his differences and reluctantly team up with Leo to stop whoever is trying to kill him.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Dirty Cops LA
programme.desc: Ex-hustler turned cop, Detective Jackson and his Partner Detective Johnson, an ex-gang member turned shady do-gooder, bring a new meaning to the phrase "boys-in-blue". Normally pre-occupied with robbing and assaulting the city's criminal element, they also make time to close a few cases along the way. The city has been taken over by an outsider known as "El Jefe", a Mexican drug lord that has decided to make LA his new home. Jackson and Johnson plan on helping him get "settled in".

programme.title: Dope Boy Magic
programme.desc: In the rough streets of Lumberton, NC, Mario wants to take the fastest path possible to a better life. Growing up with a father who was a pimp and a mother who was a prostitute, he only saw the worst in humanity on a nightly basis. Failing out of school and penniless, the only options were selling drugs, and theft. He started out breaking and entering, robbing trailer homes of known dope boys, who take notice and action.

programme.title: Complexions
programme.desc: A dark skin aspiring actress is thwarted in love and work all because the color of her skin. When caught lightening her pictures online, her supportive father and light skinned best friend struggle to help her on her journey to love herself.

programme.title: Captured
programme.desc: Jessica Johnson, a journalist, has just learned that her brother has died. Upon moving into his apartment to pick up his belongings she notices an old camera. She has no idea about the secrets behind the camera left behind. It's only a matter of time before she begins to hear and see visions only behind the camera or whenever the camera is near. Is it real? or is she hallucinating?

programme.title: Bissonnet
programme.desc: When Drea gets kicked out of school, she turns to the streets to make some money. What she does not know is that fast money and life on the streets of Bissonnet come at a high price.

programme.title: Bikini Spring Break
programme.desc: Coeds from a conservative college go wild when their bus breaks down in Florida during Spring Break.

programme.title: 4 Horsemen: Apocalypse
programme.desc: Scientists race against time to stop a cascade of global disasters signaling the possible apocalypse.

programme.title: Planet of the Sharks
programme.desc: In the future, sharks dominate the planet, led by a mutated alpha shark, as human survivors live in terror.

programme.title: Ice Sharks
programme.desc: As scientists study the effects of climate change on sea life, a new breed of shark breaks through.

programme.title: Apocalypse Pompeii
programme.desc: When Mt. Vesuvius erupts, a vacationing former SPECIAL OPS commando must rescue his trapped wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Changeling
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: Housebound (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Kylie Bucknell, a troubled young woman, attempts to steal the safe from an ATM but the police capture her. Due to her history of recidivism, she is sentenced to house arrest for eight months under the care of her mother, Miriam. Kylie does not get along with either her mother or her stepfather, Graeme. A security contractor, Amos, explains that Kylie's ankle monitor will alert the police if she ever leaves the premises of her mother's house. Kylie is further frustrated when Miriam claims the house is haunted. Amos takes Miriam's suggestion of a haunting seriously and promises to return with ghost-hunting equipment. After a series of unexplained experiences, Kylie comes to believe there may truly be a ghost in the house. Graeme reveals that their home was once a halfway house and the site of a horrific murder. They discover evidence of the crime, including an orthodontic retainer. Amos attempts to break into her neighbor's house next but the neighbor says that he is not the killer. He tells the story of a young savant, Eugene, whom he adopted. Eugene is an expert at mechanics and electronics and disappeared a year before the killing. Kylie discovers Eugene's secret hallways in their house. She and Amos converge at the police station, and Amos corroborates her wild stories of a serial killer living in the hidden passageways. Once Dennis reveals that he wears a retainer, Kylie becomes suspicious of him. When she confronts him he attempts to kill Miriam and Kylie. Kylie and Miriam flee into the secret tunnels, where they encounter Eugene. Realizing that their paranormal activity has been Eugene all this time, they realize that he is friendly. Dennis stabs Eugene, knocks out Kylie, and begins to strangle Miriam. Eugene wakes Kylie and hands her a weapon, which she uses to stab Dennis. Eugene throws a switch, and high voltage explodes Dennis' head. Months later, all have recovered and Eugene has seemingly become an accepted member of the household.

programme.title: Ghosthouse
programme.desc: A group of unlikely companions receive a radio call leading to a deserted house with a grisly past. After exploring the house, the group makes the foolish decision to split up, leading to a trail of death and destruction as the house unleashes its deadly past. Along the way expect severed heads, exploding light bulbs, demonic clown dolls, and creepy children. The clown doll is the main evil force from the film; the director of a funeral home stole it out of a child's coffin to give to his own daughter, leading to angry spirits possessing both the girl and the clown doll.

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira is put through the ringer, and hung out to dry, after sitting through this movie. She should have quit while she was a head!

programme.title: Confessional
programme.desc: After two deaths at a college on the same night, seven students are invited to a confessional booth hidden on campus.

programme.title: Wendigo
programme.desc: A boy (Erik Per Sullivan) believes a folk tale about a shape-shifting creature has something to do with his family's (Patricia Clarkson, Jake Weber) bad luck.

programme.title: Barbarians
programme.desc: Four friends come together for a celebratory dinner party at a country house. But as the night progresses dark secrets emerge and unsettling events begin to unfold around them.

programme.title: Clovehitch Killer, The
programme.desc: A picture-perfect family is shattered when the work of a serial killer hits too close to home. Dylan McDermott stars in this chilling portrait of all-American evil.

programme.title: Who Invited Them
programme.desc: A mysterious couple lingers after the other guests have left a housewarming party. The hosts start to suspect their new friends are actually duplicitous strangers with a dark secret.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to steal it.

programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first under suspicion when a murder occurs in town.

But Matt's sister, attracted to Bill, overhears the plan and rides for help.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: When it comes to fishing in Key West, you can often get a lot done in a little bit of time. After an early check in to Ocean’s Edge Resort and a mid day departure from then dock, Ali looks to Rush to put him on an afternoon bite of tuna and bottom fish that few other places can offer. If Rush is going to deliver, he will need to make a plan and stick to it to make the best use of this limited time.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: For Ali and Rush, one of the best aspects of fishing is being able to share experiences on the water with interesting people. On this episode we invite luxury watch enthusiast Eric Rivera - AKA "Watch Eric" to the Florida Keys to target Permit and Amberjack in the Gulf.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Local Knowledge crew FINALLY make it to the Bahamas and the incredible Green Turtle Club for a week of fishing, diving, and exploring the Abaco Island chain. With two incredible boats at our disposal, we make the 200 mile crossings from Miami and Cape Canaveral to rendezvous at Green Turtle Cay. Stay tuned for Part one of our Bahamas adventure!

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: The Green Turtle Cay adventure continues as the LK crew uncovers more of what the incredible out islands of the Bahamas have to offer. Shifting gears to bottom fishing, Ali catches a fish of a lifetime while Rush gets to dive and spearfish with the locals.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Bean Week with her Black Bean Empanadas, stuffing golden, flaky pastry shells with a richly seasoned black bean filling that proves legumes can be just as craveable as meat. The hosts celebrate the internet's enthusiastic response to Clinton's Bean Week proposal and dive into the week with maximum enthusiasm.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag joins Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon for the Valentine's Day week finale, making a romantic pasta dish that inspires Michael to quote an Italian chef who calls the vigorous mixing of pasta 'the sound of love.' The hosts celebrate food as the ultimate love language and toast to the week with warmth, humor, and fresh pasta.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly arrives furious after producer Nick bans his gorgeous Ted Baker sweater due to moirÈ camera interference, and the ensuing sweater feud becomes the running gag of the episode as Chewed Up enters an Anything Goes week with no cooking theme and maximum creative freedom. Michael and Carla enjoy Clinton's frustration immensely.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly pitches his inspired Loaf Three Ways concept for Anything Goes week, proposing that each host make a different loaf ó savory, sweet, and somewhere in between ó in a format he has been developing for months. The hosts celebrate the Indiana Jones Temple of Doom opening number as the perfect anthem for a week with no rules.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave and Chris talk about their recent trip to Mexico City, with culinary highlights and some classic foreigner faux-pas. Dave then interviews chef Enrique Olvera of the acclaimed 2-Michelin-Star Mexico City restaurant Pujol and beyond. They talk about Mexico City as a food city, tacos, and Enrique's signature mole dish, one of the best dishes in North America — maybe the world. Dave and Chris finish with a MOIF.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: On today's episode, Dave and Chris start with a blind ranking of stadium food...and Dave has some hot takes. They then interview New York Yankee, Cy Young award winner, and food lover, Gerrit Cole, who impresses them with his food knowledge and gives them insights into food and wine habits in his life and in Major League Baseball. Dave and Chris finish with an extensive Ask Dave answer on the history of plating and how to plate a dish.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Oyakodon & Mortadella Sandwich: Chris Ying cooks a Japanese dish called Oyakodon that he made for his buddy David Chang on a recent episode of Dinner Time Live. Oyakodon translates to “parent and child bowl” and refers to the main ingredients: chicken (the parent) and egg (the child). Chicken thighs and sliced onions are simmered in seasoned dashi, then covered in egg, which forms a custard-y blanket to be served over rice. Chris and Andrew make a Dinner Time Live recipe based on one of David Chang's favorite sandwiches in the world: a cheesy, hot, mortadella sandwich. This version has a twist—a Chinese steamed bun as a tribute to Momofuku's famous pork buns.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad, Spicy Seafood Boil, Ramen Rockefeller: Andrew makes the refreshing Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad from the Summer Menu episode of Dinner Time Live; Chris and Andrew make the Spicy-Tingly Seafood Boil and Ramen Rockefeller from the Epic Combos episode.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipe - XO Fries & Crispy Shrimp Rolls - Chris and Andrew make two more recipes from Dinner Time Live with David Chang: XO Fries and Crispy Shrimp Rolls. The XO Fries start with a bed of golden French Fries, then topped with a pile of Chinese BBQ pork and covered with a savory, slightly spicy XO sauce (made from dried seafood, ham, shallots and chili oil). The Crispy Shrimp Rolls are inspired by the famous crispy shrimp tacos from Mariscos Jalisco—a legendary food truck in LA.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Dave's Carbonara" - Chris tests out Dave Chang’s “based-on-a-true-story” spicy carbonara.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Burger Crunch Wrap" - Once again social media compels our man in the Lab to make something he’s never considered making: a bacon cheeseburger crunch wrap.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Journey to St. John's, Newfoundland, to discover the deep connection locals have with nature's bounty, and meet inspiring individuals who fish, farm, and cook with generations of tradition. programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join Chef Walter Staib on a journey to Colorado Springs, where we'll explore the history of this scenic landscape, from the indigenous Ute people through the era of homesteaders. At the Historic Rock Ledge Ranch, savor delicious recipes that have withstood the test of time. Don't miss out on this opportunity to experience the flavors and heritage of Colorado Springs!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib visits Curacao to unravel the delicious stories behind this vibrant Caribbean island. We'll meet local chefs who share their culinary passion through mouthwatering dishes like stewed papaya, okra soup, and stuffed Dutch cheese. Unforgettable flavors and island adventures await as we explore Curacao's heritage and unique cuisine, making this an episode you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib dives into the coastal bounty of Port Aransas, Texas! Discover legendary fishing tales, explore the vibrant local culture, and savor unique seafood creations with Chef Pete Mims. Experience how Texas spices meet Gulf Coast flavors in a culinary adventure that blends tradition and innovation. Join us for an unforgettable journey through the rich, diverse tastes of coastal Texas.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Saddle up for Southern charm as Chef Walter Staib rides through Nashville's history at Belle Meade Mansion. Explore the melodic roots of Country Music, visit iconic landmarks, and whip up delicious Southern eats like Country ham, fruitcake, and syllabub. Experience Nashville’s rich cultural heritage and culinary delights in this captivating journey.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: With the demolition and foundation work out of the way on the Kuppersmith Project, we’re finally ready to start building the addition and renovating the existing exterior to turn our 1926 house into a practical home any family would love to own.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: With the additions to our 1926 Kuppersmith Project house framed up and the roofing on, the next big step was roughing in all the plumbing, wiring, and ductwork so we can get started installing the insulation and drywall in the house.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Next up in our extensive renovation of the 1926 Kuppersmith Project house, we installed foam insulation in the walls and attic, hung drywall, painted the exterior, and began installing the kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The interior of the Kuppersmith Project house is taking shape as the cabinetry, moldings, and heart pine flooring are installed. Plus, we take sneak peak at the finished décor from designer Joe Boehm of Better Homes & Gardens magazine.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re grading the lot and preparing for the driveway on the outside of the Kuppersmith Project house renovation. Meanwhile on the inside, we’re focused on installing the granite and quartz countertops in the kitchen and master bath.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re tackling a number of projects outside on the Kuppersmith house, including installing motorized retractable screens and pouring the concrete driveway. Inside we’re putting in a shower surround and putting down a tile floor in the bathroom.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Work on the Kuppersmith Project – my extensive renovation of a 1926 Tudor style home – kicked into high gear with the sanding and finishing of the antique heart pine floors and installation of a beautiful paver patio.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: From lattice to lawn irrigation, there are a lot of details that have to be addressed when tackling a major renovation like the Kuppersmith Project house.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: My extensive renovation of the 1926 Kuppersmith Project home entered the home stretch with the plumbing and electrical fixtures and door hardware being installed. Outside, landscaping the yard of the historic home was underway.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The final touches are underway on the Kuppersmith Project before the decorators arrive. From landscaping and outdoor lighting to finishing the garage and installing door locks, my renovation of this historic 1926 home is almost complete.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: After months of renovation and remodeling, followed by weeks of decorating from the design team at Better Homes and Gardens and Renovation Style magazines, the Kuppersmith Project house is finally finished, and it’s time to take the grand tour!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If there’s a new product or tool to make your home better, you’ll find it at the on display at the International Builder’s Show. We were on hand for this year’s show to give you a front row seat on the latest trends and innovations in home improvement.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your yard could use some TLC, we’ve got you covered! Our Around the Yard editor, Julie Day, provided a wealth of tips – from dealing with weeds and pruning shrubs to watering and fertilizing plants – to make your yard the best looking on the block.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Spring is a great time to get outdoors and take care of all those nagging repair jobs around your home. From fixing outdoor faucets and pressure washing your home to repairing an asphalt or concrete driveway, we’ve got you covered!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: You’ve seen them on late night TV promising to solve all the woes of home ownership; but do those problem solving products for the home really work, or are they just as waste of your time and money? We put them to the test to find out!

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: The India of today is full of change, and a world of complexity. We talk about India as eternal and spiritual, but in a few decades, it has evolved into an economic force to be reckoned with in the 21st century. Meet the people who are leading India into the future and what they are striving for.

programme.title: Mythical Roads
programme.desc: The Gulf Stream is among the strongest tidal currents on Earth. It warms our coastlines in winter, and harbors billions of aquatic species. Soar across the Atlantic Ocean with the mighty Gulf Stream and get to know the fishermen, scientists, fish farmers, and sailors that move with the current.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: In the heart of America, a pair of vast national grasslands of historical significance remain intact. Head out into the great wide open with Jeff, David, and Jon who successfully capture the essence of America's idyllic prairies.

programme.title: Green Tourism
programme.desc: On the edge of one of the most tranquil beaches in Portugal there is a hotel that has combined contemporary design and eco-friendly design. First, we head north to Scotland to meet a family who has built a guesthouse that is 100% Green.

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: Explore the lesser-known jungles, mountains, and lakes of the Dominican Republic, catch a glimpse of the fascinating history of the Tainos Indians, and listen to the electrifying steps and sounds of merengue dance and salsa music on this Caribbean treasure.

programme.title: Green Paradise
programme.desc: Chilean Patagonia is an exceptional part of the world. The immense beauty and grandeur of this land will burn everlasting images and memories into your mind. Located within this extraordinary mountain range exist two granite towers overlooking the Patagonian plain amid flourishing waters.

programme.title: Recreating Eden
programme.desc: Birgit Piskor's garden is a favorite stop for visitors who take part in Victoria, British Columbia's garden tours. In just a few years, Birgit created a flourishing garden surrounding her urban home that has changed her life forever.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal: Portuguese cuisine holds a dear place in Tony's culinary heart. Tony travels to Porto, home of the famous Port wine, where he is immediately exposed to the codfish and the almost mythical place it holds in Portuguese cuisine and culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: San Sebastian, Spain: Tony explores the food-crazed Basque culture. Tony's guide, Chef Luis Irizar, takes Tony into the underworld of Basque gastronomic societies. Later, Tony explores the city's tapas bars.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Arcachon, France: Here, Bourdain first learned to love food as a child. Returning for a trip down memory lane, Tony enjoys childhood staples, including steak frites, gaufres (waffles), soupe de pecheur (fisherman's soup) and fresh oysters.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal & Southwest France: Visiting his boss's family farm, Tony helps slaughter and feast on a pig the family has been fattening all year. Then, Tony heads to France to experience the rich delights of a foie gras farm.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Morocco (Sahara): Tony traverses the Moroccan desert with one goal in mind, to eat a mud-oven-roasted sheep.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Morocco (Cities): Tony is invited to experience the culinary heart and distinct walled medinas (districts) of the Moroccan city Fes.
